claim: Froese 三指標：讓魚繁殖、長到最適體長Lopt、讓大型產卵魚活著；無上限時大型個體佔30-40%為健康結構
evidence_quote: percentage of 'mega-spawners' in catch, with 0% as target, and 30-40% as representative of reasonable stock structure if no upper size limit exists

claim: 釣魚放流致死率整合分析：53篇研究、中位數11%、平均18%、範圍0-95%，越深水越高（氣壓傷）
agency: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries (Bartholomew & Bohnsack 2005)
evidence_quote: A meta-analysis of combined data (n=274) showed a skewed distribution of release mortality (median 11%, mean 18%, range 0-95%)

claim: ERAEF生態風險評估：評估單位是「漁法子漁業×物種」，用PSA對每一漁法逐物種評分——依行為/漁法而非工具名稱管理的現成制度
agency: Fisheries Research / AFMA (Hobday et al. 2011; Sporcic et al. 2021)
evidence_locator: Sporcic et al. 2021 標題頁；Hobday 2011 Fish. Res. 108:372
evidence_quote: Ecological Risk Assessment for the Effects of Fishing. Report for Southern and Eastern Scalefish and Shark Fishery (Commonwealth Trawl Sector): Otter trawl Sub-fishery

claim: 魚槍全球回顧：魚槍者「可能」偏好射大型個體但『並非普遍模式』；自由潛水受深度限制、深水魚有天然庇護；呼籲量身管理而非禁止
agency: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries (Sbragaglia et al. 2023)
evidence_quote: can deliberately target larger individuals of exploited populations, this is not a generalizable pattern

claim: 水肺魚槍移除深度庇護：自由潛水的深度限制本身構成保育緩衝，水肺則消除之——風險來自行為（水肺）而非工具（魚槍）
evidence_quote: the selectivity patterns of spearfishing may differ from other fishing methods because of the depth limitations of spearfishers, especially in freediving
